overview: A premium AI-powered job application tracker with smart URL parsing, drag-and-drop Kanban pipeline, powerful table view with natural language search, and an analytics dashboard with personalized AI insights — all in a polished, modern interface.
features: AI-powered job URL parsing with Job Fit Score
Smart applications table with natural language search and AI flagging
Drag-and-drop Kanban pipeline with stall detection and AI suggestions
Analytics dashboard with interactive charts and personalized AI insights
Inline status editing and customizable columns
Light/dark mode with OKLCH design system
Internet Identity authentication with protected routes
Sample data with 20+ realistic demo applications
